final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — references in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai's Chungking Express, 王家卫 90s urban romance palette, 徐克 fantasy wuxia poster tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the central couple embracing on a city wall as focal point, two figures standing in the distant background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 (central couple embracing), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 (distant background figures)
Scene/backdrop: must include the iconic city wall setting from the film
Lighting/mood: needs a romantic, nostalgic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture throughout
Text (verbatim): must include "大话西游" as the main title
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
